en: In the ninth year of Zedekiah king of Judah, in the tenth month, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon and all his army came against Jerusalem and besieged it.
zh: 猶大王西底家第九年十月，巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒率領他的全軍來攻擊耶路撒冷，把城圍困起來。

en: In the eleventh year of Zedekiah, in the fourth month, on the ninth day of the month, a breach was made in the city.
zh: 西底家第十一年四月九日，城被攻破。

en: Then all the officials of the king of Babylon came and sat in the middle gate: Nergal-sar-ezer, Samgar-nebu, Sar-sekim the Rab-saris, Nergal-sar-ezer the Rab-mag, with all the rest of the officers of the king of Babylon.
zh: 巴比倫王所有的將領：尼甲．沙利薛、三甲．尼波、大臣 撒西金、術士長 尼甲．沙利薛，以及巴比倫王所有其餘的將領，都進城，坐在中門。

en: When Zedekiah king of Judah and all the soldiers saw them, they fled, going out of the city at night by way of the king's garden through the gate between the two walls; and they went toward the Arabah.
zh: 猶大王西底家和所有的軍兵看見了他們，就逃跑，在夜間逃出城外，經過王的花園，穿過兩道城牆中間的門，直往亞拉巴的路上走去。

en: But the army of the Chaldeans pursued them and overtook Zedekiah in the plains of Jericho. And when they had taken him, they brought him up to Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon, at Riblah, in the land of Hamath; and he passed sentence on him.
zh: 但迦勒底人的軍隊追趕他們，在耶利哥的原野上追上了西底家，把他拿住，帶到哈馬地的利比拉去見巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒；尼布甲尼撒就宣判他的罪狀。

en: The king of Babylon slaughtered the sons of Zedekiah at Riblah before his eyes, and the king of Babylon slaughtered all the nobles of Judah.
zh: 巴比倫王在利比拉，當著西底家眼前殺了他的眾子；巴比倫王也殺了猶大所有的顯貴，

en: He put out the eyes of Zedekiah and bound him in chains to take him to Babylon.
zh: 並且把西底家的眼睛弄瞎了，用銅鍊鎖住他，把他帶到巴比倫去。

en: The Chaldeans burned the king's house and the house of the people, and broke down the walls of Jerusalem.
zh: 迦勒底人放火焚燒王宮和民房，又拆毀了耶路撒冷的城牆。

en: Then Nebuzaradan, the captain of the guard, carried into exile to Babylon the rest of the people who were left in the city, those who had deserted to him, and the people who remained.
zh: 城裡剩下的人民，和那些已經向巴比倫王投降的人，以及其餘的人民，都被護衛長尼布撒拉旦擄到巴比倫去。

en: Nebuzaradan, the captain of the guard, left in the land of Judah some of the poor people who owned nothing, and gave them vineyards and fields at the same time.
zh: 但護衛長尼布撒拉旦把民中一些一無所有的窮人留在猶大地，同時把葡萄園和田地分給他們。

en: Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon gave command concerning Jeremiah through Nebuzaradan, the captain of the guard, saying,
zh: 巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒提到耶利米，吩咐護衛長尼布撒拉旦說：

en: "Take him, look after him well, and do him no harm, but deal with him as he tells you."
zh: “你把他帶去，好好照顧他，切不可傷害他；他對你怎樣說，你就給他照辦。”

en: So Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard, Nebushazban the Rab-saris, Nergal-sar-ezer the Rab-mag, and all the chief officers of the king of Babylon
zh: 於是護衛長尼布撒拉旦、大臣 尼布沙斯班、術士長 尼甲．沙利薛，以及巴比倫王所有的大臣都派人去，

en: sent and took Jeremiah from the court of the guard. They entrusted him to Gedaliah the son of Ahikam, son of Shaphan, that he should take him home. So he lived among the people.
zh: 把耶利米從衛兵的院子裡提出來，交給沙番的孫子、亞希甘的兒子基大利，叫他帶耶利米回家去。這樣，耶利米就住在人民中間。

en: The word of the LORD came to Jeremiah while he was shut up in the court of the guard:
zh: 耶利米還監禁在衛兵的院子裡的時候，耶和華的話臨到他，說：

en: "Go, and say to Ebed-melech the Ethiopian, 'Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: Behold, I will fulfill my words against this city for harm and not for good, and they shall be accomplished before you on that day.
zh: “你去告訴古實人以伯．米勒說：‘萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：看哪！我必在這城實現我的話，降禍不降福；到那日，這一切都必在你面前實現。

en: But I will deliver you on that day, declares the LORD, and you shall not be given into the hand of the men of whom you are afraid.
zh: 但到了那日，我必拯救你；你必不至交在你所懼怕的人手裡。’這是耶和華的宣告。

en: For I will surely save you, and you shall not fall by the sword, but you shall have your life as a prize of war, because you have put your trust in me, declares the LORD.'"
zh: ‘因為我必定搭救你；你必不會倒在刀下，必可以撿回自己的性命，因為你信靠我。’”這是耶和華的宣告。
